narrative: Strait of Hormuz closure supports crude near $90 as reports of a US-Iran deal and weak US GDP sink the dollar — gold higher +1.13% near $4,532; equities +0.55%; DXY -0.18%; VIX 15.6. NZD/JPY bilateral divergence (+1.132% spread) dominates G8 as NZD 1W avg (+0.737%, n=4) outperforms JPY (-0.396%, n=7). USD/JPY at 159.28 remains anchored by 300bp OIS carry despite USD selling pressure. Watch next RBNZ meeting for further NZD directional momentum.
